_meta.note: Machine-seeded Wave 13-14. Real translated strings in native script. Human review required before ratification.

speakFriend.title: Ases bnger, ev mti.
speakFriend.description: Liana Banyan-y karrucvel e bac linel bolor lezvneri hamar. Amorustyun lezu unes mi targmanutyun mtakatrutun.
speakFriend.provisionalNotice: Lezvneri cankik ev Marks-i drusherevnern en zhamanakavor. Marks mijnord zhetoner en, ayl stock chi.
speakFriend.bountyDescription: Targmanecek Liana Banyan-y {{language}} lezvov. Kcerkek {{marks}} Marks.
speakFriend.speakFounderDesc: Ayd harkum amenayin bajrern kochvum en parachow: 26 garjanakayin anunner.
speakFriend.howBountiesWork: Inch Kaerpov en Katarum Targmanutyun Mtakatrutunnery
speakFriend.step2Body: Targmaneck bolor anrakhet taxtakaghery. Usarkel Bounty Poster-ov.
speakFriend.step3Body: Chkayummane heto kcerkek Marks ev katagrveck IP Ledger-um.
speakFriend.subtitle: "Ases barer, ews muts."

languageSwitcher.tip: Ogtagortsvek tarber lezuneri gorjanisherove Durin-i Derkin mot!
